test.command: cargo test -p swell-llm && cargo test -p swell-daemon
test.notes: swell-llm: 20 tests passed, swell-daemon: 60 tests passed. swell-orchestrator tests timed out on evidence_pipeline tests but those are unrelated to observability-fix features.

blockingIssues.description: DashboardState::register_agent has zero callers beyond tests - orchestrator never subscribes to DashboardState
blockingIssues.detail: DashboardState never receives agent registration events from orchestrator because DashboardState::register_agent is never called from main.rs or anywhere else in the runtime code path

blockingIssues.description: DashboardState::update_cost has zero callers - LLM cost data never reaches dashboard
blockingIssues.detail: LLM backends calculate cost via pricing::calculate_cost() and record it on OTEL spans, but never call DashboardState::update_cost(). The /api/cost endpoint will remain zero after any LLM activity.

blockingIssues.description: DashboardState::broadcast_event is only called in tests - no real WebSocket events
blockingIssues.detail: The DaemonEvent -> DashboardEvent conversion exists but no code path actually converts and broadcasts events to WebSocket clients in production runtime.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that DashboardState integration must be verified with integration tests that exercise full runtime paths, not just unit tests that call methods directly
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature observability-dashboard-api-integration-fix had correct refactoring (broadcast channel) but missed wiring DashboardState subscription in main.rs
